planner_output.reasoning_trace: The user is asking about a laptop, which is outside the personal audio catalog scope (headphones and earbuds only). This should be handled as off-topic rather than a search or clarification.

final_response:
Ah, my dear friend! While I appreciate your quest for a laptop, I must gently remind you that my expertise lies strictly within the realm of headphones, earbuds, in-ear monitors, and their delightful audio companions. Think of me as your trusty guide to the world of sound—where every note matters and built-in laptop speakers are an affront to my very being! 

So, if you're looking to enhance your listening experience, ask away about headphones or earbuds, and I’ll help you find the perfect pair! 🎧✨
